title: Cleanup ALL TEST button appears to do nothing - confusing UI feedback
description: The 'Cleanup ALL TEST' button technically works (API returns 200) but provides confusing UI feedback showing '-1 documents deleted' instead of clear success message. Additionally, no chunk/entry level cleanup options exist.
user_report: Cleanup ALL TEST button does not seem to do anything. Selecting a collection and cleaning it up does work. However there is no option to find and clean single chunks/entries.

technical_analysis.root_cause_primary: AstraDB delete_many() returns -1 for empty collections instead of 0, causing confusing UI display
technical_analysis.root_cause_secondary: No chunk/entry level cleanup functionality implemented
affected_components: Cleanup ALL TEST button UI feedback

error_details.ui_display: Shows 'Documents Deleted: -1' which looks like an error
log_evidence: 2025-08-26 12:52:54,082 - app.common.astra_client - INFO - Cleaned up -1 chunks from test environment
2025-08-26 12:57:43,742 - app.common.astra_client - INFO - Cleaned up -1 chunks from test environment

reproduction_steps: 5. Note: API actually works but UI feedback is misleading
expected_behavior: Clear success message indicating cleanup completed, even for empty collections. Should show '0 documents deleted' or 'Collection already empty - cleanup completed'
actual_behavior: Shows 'Documents Deleted: -1' which appears to be an error when it's actually successful cleanup of empty collection

immediate_fixes.action: Handle -1 response from AstraDB in UI feedback
immediate_fixes.implementation: Check if result.deleted === -1 and show 'Collection already empty' message

immediate_fixes.rationale: User specifically requested this missing feature
immediate_fixes.implementation: Add search and selective delete for individual chunks

enhancement_request.title: Add chunk/entry level cleanup granularity
enhancement_request.description: Users need ability to find and cleanup individual chunks/entries, not just entire collections
suggested_features: Chunk search by text content or metadata
Bulk chunk selection with filters (date range, source_id, etc)
Chunk count and preview before deletion

test_cases: Cleanup empty collection should show clear success message
Cleanup collection with data should show actual count
Chunk search should return relevant results
Individual chunk deletion should work with confirmation

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - functionality works but confusing UX
impact_assessment.data_risk: Low - cleanup works correctly despite UI confusion

related_requirements: ADM-005: Admin UI should provide clear feedback for all operations
ADM-006: Database management must support granular operations
